heading: Multiple debts
label: 1692h Multiple debts
text: If any consumer owes multiple debts and makes any single payment to any debt collector with respect to such debts, such debt collector may not apply such payment to any debt which is disputed by the consumer and, where applicable, shall apply such payment in accordance with the consumer’s directions.
notes: Effective DateSection effective upon the expiration of six months after , see , as added by , set out as a note under .Sept. 20, 1977section 819 of Pub. L. 90–321Pub. L. 95–109section 1692 of this title
